MOTION / Amended Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.*** The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RAVI ANAND'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff.

The unopposed motion is granted. Moving party to prepare and send a proposed order in Word format to the Court at JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John Paul Deol, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/jpt)

***Katrine Taran, appears late after the case has been called and the court informs the party the tentative has been adopted.***

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel

MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Pavel Krepkiy Esq., ANNA DUBROVSKY LAW GROUP, INC. (415) 746-1477 pavel@dubrovskylawyers.com Attorneys for Plaintiff KATRINE TARAN
Rosemary McCarthy, Esq., 408-569-5891, rmccarthy01@gmail.com, Specially appearing for Defendant Ravi Anand.

"in Camera Hearing" is held with Plaintiff's counsel Pavel Krepkiy in chambers after the 9:30 a.m. calendar is adjourned.

PLAINTIFF KATRINE TARAN'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is granted.

Order is signed.
